column1: Naive /3 of Claude Code — NOT recommended
Tooling (not labour): Claude Code Max ~EUR200/mo x ~2-4 project months = ~EUR400-800; plus minor DeepL/API.
Contract caps to hold the low end: catalog <= ~500 SKU; limit design revision rounds; limit translation-tone revision rounds.
Launch blocker: PayPal high-risk (herbs/rape) merchant verification — start day one; bank transfer is the fallback.
